title: oxytropis dispar
intro: Oxytropis dispar, also known as Red Milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of Western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Oxytropis dispar include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Oxytropis dispar can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support respiratory health and reduce inflammation.
